# Strings {.unnumbered}

::: callout
## Learning Objectives
+ Clean and extract information from character variables using `stringr` 
:::

<!--I was told that we are actually not wanting to work with regular expressions now, so I removed it from the material.
-->

<!-- "basic" regex = lets stick with specific character options like [Aa] or [A-Z] -->

<!-- It would be great to have another custom function example in this chap. -->

<!-- https://r4ds.hadley.nz/strings.html
https://r4ds.hadley.nz/regexps.html  -->
